options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage

options.name: -allow_jog
options.description: Specifies the allowed jog type.

options.name: -allow_nonpreferred_dir
options.description: Specifies whether to allow non-preferred direction to jog to target

options.name: -area
options.description: Specify the rectangular areas or rectilinear areas or a mix of them, the correct value should be {<lx ly ux uy> | <x1 y1 x2 y2 x3 y3 ...>}

options.name: -break_at
options.description: Specifies the stripe break point.

options.name: -color_balance
options.description: same_color would correspond to interlace with groups and alternate_color would correspond to interlace within group

options.name: -continue_on_no_selection
options.description: Specifies whether to continue w/o selection

options.name: -detailed_log
options.description: Specifies whether to output detailed log file addStripe.log

options.name: -domain_offset_from_core
options.description: Specifies whether to use global offset for power domain stripes

options.name: -extend_to_closest_target
options.description: Specifies the stripe to specified target

options.name: -extend_to_first_ring
options.description: Specifies whether to extend stripe antennas to closest ring

options.name: -ignore_block_check
options.description: Specifies whether to ignore block check

options.name: -ignore_blockring_when_breaking
options.description: Specifies whether to break stripe outside block

options.name: -ignore_DRC
options.description: Specifies whether to ignore DRC check during stripe generation, it is always used for prototype flow

options.name: -ignore_nondefault_domains
options.description: Specifies whether to break at non-default domain

options.name: -inside_cell_allow_shift
options.description: Specifies to allow the created pillar inside cell can be shifted when meeting DRC

options.name: -inside_cell_only
options.description: Specifies whether to generate stripes only inside selected or specified cell

options.name: -max_extension_distance
options.description: Specifies maximum extension distance(default=max integer) when -extend_to_closest_target is specified.

options.name: -max_via_size
options.description: the maximum size of a crossover via, the correct value should be {shape width% height% target_penetration%}

options.name: -merge_with_all_layers
options.description: Specifies whether to merge a stripe on all layers

options.name: -mesh_via
options.description: use mesh via to reduce memory

options.name: -offset_from_core
options.description: Specifies whether to offset first or last stripe from the core area

options.name: -optimize_stripe_for_routing_track
options.description: move stripe location to preserve routing resource

options.name: -orthogonal_offset
options.description: Specifies the offsets for edges orthogonally, the correct value should be {[{edge1 orthogonal_offset1} {edge2 edge3 orthogonal_offset2} {edge4 edge5 ... orthogonal_offset3} ...] | [all orthogonal_offset]}

options.name: -orthogonal_only
options.description: vias connect to orthogonal targets only

options.name: -over_row_extension
options.description: Specifies whether to extend the stripe to cover followpin at the row end

options.name: -partial_set_thru_domain
options.description: Specifies whether to go over power domain if domain contains the specified net

options.name: -recommend_width
options.description: Specify the values of recommended width in the file name

options.name: -remove_floating_stapling
options.description: remove floating stapling stripe if there is no via connection

options.name: -remove_floating_stripe_over_block
options.description: Specifies whether to remove stripe fragments start and end inside same block or ring macro

options.name: -remove_stripe_under_ring
options.description: Specifies whether to remove those segments under rings.

options.name: -respect_routes
options.description: Specifies whether to honor pre-existing routes check during stripe generation

options.name: -route_over_rows_only
options.description: Specifies whether to route stripe over rows within the boundary

options.name: -rows_without_stripes_only
options.description: Specifies whether to generate stripes over rows w/o stripes

options.name: -same_sized_stack_vias
options.description: generate same-sized stacked vias

options.name: -skip_via_on_pin
options.description: prevent vias from being generated on the specified type of pins

options.name: -skip_via_on_wire_shape
options.description: prevent vias from being generated on the specified wire shapes

options.name: -spacing_from_block
options.description: Specifies the spacing from block

options.name: -spacing_type
options.description: Specify the type of intra spacing for addStripe -spacing

options.name: -split_long_via
options.description: Split vias longer than <threshold> into smaller vias with specified <step> and bottom/left end <offset> and vertical/horizontal <length>, the correct value should be {threshold step offset length}

options.name: -split_vias
options.description: create multiple partial vias

options.name: -split_wire_spacing
options.description: Specifies the spacing between each split wire

options.name: -split_wire_weight
options.description: Deletes fewest IO wires to accommodate approximately n of 10 split stripe wires

options.name: -split_wire_width
options.description: Specifies the width of each split wire

options.name: -stacked_via_bottom_layer
options.description: lef layer name

options.name: -stacked_via_top_layer
options.description: lef layer name

options.name: -stapling_extend_to_minimum_spacing
options.description: Specified to automatically extend the adjacent stapling as long as enough to satisfy the end-to-end minimum spacing with DRC free

options.name: -stapling_nets_style
options.description: Specify the stapling style if multiple nets are specified

options.name: -stapling_shift
options.description: shift stapling stripe to avoid the drc automatically

options.name: -stop_at_closest_target
options.description: Specifies the stripe to specified target when over_pins is enabled.

options.name: -stop_at_last_wire_for_area
options.description: Specifies whether to trim back stripe antennas to the closest wire or pin of the same net

options.name: -stripe_min_length
options.description: Specifies the minimum stripe length

options.name: -stripe_min_width
options.description: Specifies the min width of remaining stripe after being trimmed

options.name: -switch_cellname
options.description: Specifies the switch cells to be treated as rings

options.name: -switch_layer_overlap_length
options.description: Specifies the overlap distance used for the via between a stripe layer and the layer being switched to

options.name: -trim_antenna_back_to_shape
options.description: Specifies the distance between the end of antenna and blocked target

options.name: -trim_antenna_max_distance
options.description: Specifies the distance between the end of antenna and blocked target

options.name: -trim_stripe
options.description: Specifies if stripe is trimmed by the specified shape.

options.name: -use_exact_spacing
options.description: Specifies whether to use exact spacing

options.name: -use_point2point_router
options.description: Specifies whether to use exact spacing

options.name: -use_stripe_width
options.description: Specifies whether to use stripe width

options.name: -via_using_exact_crossover_size
options.description: generate partial vias of the exact crossover size

options.name: -quiet
options.description: Displays the current settings in Tcl list format only

options.name: -nonDefault
options.description: Displays the current settings which are not default settings
